{{Quote|There are some planets that have a reputation for beautiful women, like Beckoning Call Starr 3.|Han Solo|<ref name="Journal" />}}
'''Beckoning Call Starr 3''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Journal" /> of the [[Beckoning Call Starr system/Legends|Beckoning Call Starr system]],<ref name="Atlas" /> located in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion<ref name="Slice" /> of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="Atlas" /> The planet had a reputation for beautiful [[Gender/Legends|women]], with which the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was familiar.<ref name="Journal" />

==Behind the scenes==
Beckoning Call Starr 3 was created for the [[1998]] young-readers story ''[[Star Wars Journal: Hero for Hire]]'', written by [[Donna Tauscher]].<ref name="Journal" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Beckoning Call Starr [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square O-10.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Journal: Hero for Hire]]'' {{1stm}}
